boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operator execute this Insurance claims / coverage controls action now? Action: total-loss settlement missing title document. Boundary: valuation memo cannot settle without title closure.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records do not close the boundary

final_answer: Escalate. The current source-control record does not close the exact boundary for total-loss settlement with missing title document. Valuation memo cannot authorize settlement before title closure, and the source records still show unresolved title documents, valuation, and lienholder status match.
